name: react-workflows
description: Frontend structure conventions for React/TSX work. Ships react-structure: enforces per-component file separation (UI .tsx / hook .ts / type.ts / optional Redux slice), a TypeScript + Redux Toolkit + MUI + DataGridPremium stack, and a planning flowchart before any code. Opt-in: install only when working on a React project so it does not trigger during backend/CRM work.
